בין השמיים למדבר: Between the Sky and the Desert
גן אירועים, אולם, ריזורט וחדרי אירוח, מו: A garden venue, hall, resort and guest rooms, framed by the open, breathtaking landscape of the Judean Desert
פינה לנשום בלב הערב: A place to breathe, at the heart of the evening
בגאמוס, חוויית האירוח מתחילה במטבח. בהוב: At Gamos, the hospitality begins in the kitchen. Led by an acclaimed chef and a seasoned professional team, bespoke menus are crafted to order — combining the finest fresh ingredients, culinary creativity and attention to every detail
A tender cut, precisely roasted, in a dark wine sauce.
Fresh fish, thinly sliced, with olive oil, chili and radish.
Crisp pastry, warm syrup and chopped pistachio.
Thin slices in citrus oil, chili and radishes.
נתח על הגריל, תפוחי אדמה חרוכים ושיפוד י: A grilled cut with charred potatoes and a vegetable skewer.
נתח רך ברוטב דובדבנים, שעועית ובצל מקורמ: A tender cut in cherry sauce, green beans and caramelized onion.
עלים ירוקים, פלחי תפוח ירוק ופצפוצי קראנ: Green leaves, green apple slices and a crunchy topping.
A crisp filo wrap over a bed of beetroot with sprouts.
Thin slices in olive oil, arugula, garlic and balsamic.
בופה עשיר ומעוצב — מעמדות שף חיות, סושי-: A rich, curated buffet — live chef stations, a sushi bar, open grill and taboon-baked pastries, all prepared by hand before your guests.
שבת חתן בניחוח של חוץ לארץ: A Groom's Shabbat that Feels a World Away
מרגע קבלת השבת ועד לסיומה, כל שלבי האירו: From the welcoming of Shabbat to its close, every part of the hosting unfolds within a single estate — lodging, meals, prayers and family time, all in one distinctive setting.
חלל רחב ומואר המשתלב עם הנוף הפתוח המאפש: A wide, light-filled space that blends into the open landscape, letting you host your loved ones in a private estate — in comfort and with an exceptional sense of space.
האור הטבעי, הקווים הנקיים והמרחב הפתוח י: The natural light, clean lines and open space create a warm, elegant and inviting setting for every moment of Shabbat.
A clean, carefully arranged setting of tables that opens to the desert — shared seating that brings the whole family around a single table.
שולחן החתן ערוך בפרחי שדה: The Groom's Table Set with Wildflowers
סידור מוקפד המאפשר לכל בני המשפחה והאורח: A meticulous arrangement that gathers family and guests around one table, in an atmosphere that unites people, design and open space.
מהעמדת הכלים ועד סידורי השולחן, כל פרט ז: From the placing of the tableware to the table arrangements, every detail receives the utmost care — from the belief that hospitality begins in the smallest things.
לישון במתחם, להתעורר אל המדבר: Sleep at the Estate, Wake to the Desert
פתחו את הדלת אל גלריית החדרים והסוויטות: Open the door to the Gamos rooms and suites gallery.
גאמוס נולד מתוך חזון ליצור מקום שאין דומ: Gamos was born of a vision to create a place unlike any other in Israel — an estate that blends refined architecture, open spaces, hosting of the highest order and breathtaking desert views.
במתחם משתלבים אולם אירועים, ריזורט יוקרת: The estate brings together an events hall, a luxury resort,
סוויטות אירוח, מתחם Wellness, בריכה מחומ: guest suites, a wellness area, a heated pool, a synagogue, dedicated hosting spaces and personal service that accompanies every event from start to finish.
כל פרט בגאמוס תוכנן בקפידה, כדי להעניק ח: Every detail at Gamos was carefully designed to offer a complete experience in one place — a place to celebrate, stay, rest and create memories that linger long after the event ends.
נוף מדבר עוצר נשימה ומיקום אסטרטגי: Breathtaking desert views and a strategic location
חתונה אינטימית / ממוצעת / גדולה במיוחד,: An intimate wedding, a mid-size gathering or a grand celebration — in the garden, the hall, the resort or across the entire estate. We are ready for every kind of event, with a professional team that stays beside you from the first idea to the last dance, wrapping the whole day in complete, attentive care.
חגיגה בלתי נשכחת לילדים ולמשפחה, עם מתחמ: An unforgettable celebration for children and family — with dedicated spaces, programming, attractions and an atmosphere that moves every generation.
אירוע משפחתי באווירה אלגנטית ונעימה, עם: A family event in an elegant, welcoming atmosphere, with meticulous hospitality, quality cuisine and personal guidance from the very first moment.
כנסים, השקות, ערבי גיבוש ואירועי יוקרה,: Conferences, launches, team evenings and prestige events, with tailored solutions, professional service and production of the highest order.
ימי הולדת, ימי נישואין, חגיגות משפחתיות: Birthdays, anniversaries, family celebrations and any private event — each given an impressive stage and an unforgettable experience with us.
אירוח מלא במתחם הריזורט השמור רק לכם, עם: Full hosting at the resort estate reserved just for you, with suites, a synagogue, a heated pool and cuisine that give you a whole weekend in one place.
בגאמוס מקפידים על סטנדרט כשרות גבוה, בפי: At Gamos we uphold a high standard of kashrut under Rabbinate supervision, with the option to adapt the level of kashrut to the event's needs — so every guest enjoys a refined culinary experience with complete peace of mind.
Let's bring your event to life.
צוות המומחים של גאמוס עומד לרשותכם כדי ל: The Gamos team of experts is at your service to turn your vision into reality. Contact us to arrange a tour of the estate and receive a personalized proposal.
Required fields: name, phone, email and event type. We'll get back to you within one business day.
שליחת פרטים ותיאום סיור במתחם: Send details & arrange an estate tour
די זהב 7, פארק ישראל, מעלה אדומים: 7 Dei Zahav St., Park Israel, Ma'ale Adumim
המתחם כולו תוכנן ונבנה על פי תקני הנגישו: The entire estate was designed and built to the most stringent accessibility standards. Every space — from the parking and entrance gates, through the events garden and the main hall, to the restrooms — is fully and respectfully accessible. Marked, illuminated emergency exits are located throughout the estate.

גאמוס, קומפלקס אירועים יוקרתי בפארק ישרא: Gamos, a luxury events complex in Park Israel, Ma'ale Adumim. Two venues: a glass hall for up to 1,000 guests and a resort with a pool, guest rooms and cuisine. Weddings, Bar Mitzvahs and corporate events.
קומפלקס אירועים יוקרתי בפארק ישראל, מעלה: A luxury events complex in Park Israel, Ma'ale Adumim. A glass hall for up to 1,000 guests, a resort with a pool, guest rooms and cuisine.

משפחת בוזגלו חגגה בר מצווה בגאמוס בפארק: The Buzaglo family celebrated a bar mitzvah at Gamos in Park Israel, with six DJs and a sunrise session until morning.
חתונת בתו של מנחם טוקר התקיימה באולמי גא: The wedding of Menachem Tucker's daughter took place at the Gamos halls in Park Israel, attended by rabbis and leading figures of the music industry.
השף אבי ביטון חגג יום הולדת 40 לחברתו בר: Chef Avi Biton celebrated his partner's 40th birthday at a private resort within the luxury Gamos events estate in Ma'ale Adumim.
נפתח קומפלקס אירועים בגודל 11 דונם בהשקע: An 11-dunam events complex has opened, with an investment of some 100 million shekels, comprising a hall, an events garden and a resort with 33 rooms.
קומפלקס גאמוס שנפתח בפארק ישראל כולל אול: The Gamos complex that opened in Park Israel includes an events hall, a landscaped garden and a resort with 33 suites.
